# Sprint 1 — proposed scope (planning aid)

**Not** auto-generated by BMad; use this as a **starting slice** for sprint-by-sprint planning. **`sprint-config.yaml`** sets **1-week** sprints—keep each sprint to **1–2 small stories** unless you have extra capacity.

**Sprint 1 official start:** `2026-04-13` (see `sprint-config.yaml`). Story **`1-1-module-boundary-audit-targeted-refactors`** dev file created `2026-04-12`; **do not begin implementation before** the sprint start date unless policy changes.

## Goal

Establish **safe foundations** so API and engine work do not fight **layering** or **secrets** rules.

## Candidate stories (pull into Sprint 1 if capacity fits)

| Story key | Title | Rationale |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| `1-1-module-boundary-audit-targeted-refactors` | Module boundary audit | Unblocks clean changes everywhere |
| `1-2-settings-secrets-hygiene` | Settings & secrets hygiene | NFR-S1 / FR32 baseline |

## Optional stretch (if team >1 or longer sprint)

| Story key | Title |
|-----------|--------|
| `7-1-compose-stack-for-app-db` | Compose stack — if local env is blocking everyone |

## Out of Sprint 1 (typical)

- Full **E2** API stories — often **Sprint 2** after boundaries are clear (your call).

## After Sprint 1

1. Mark completed story keys **`done`** in `sprint-status.yaml` (and epic `in-progress` / `done` as appropriate).  
2. Re-run **`bmad-sprint-planning`** or edit YAML by hand.  
3. Create **`sprint-2-plan.md`** using the same pattern when you plan the next sprint.
